C:\git\mingw\cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\IV_week.dir/objects.a
C:\git\mingw\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\IV_week.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\IV_week.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\git\mingw\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\IV_week.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o IV_week.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libIV_week.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\IV_week.dir\linklibs.rsp
